summary: Verified React Hooks code quality fixes on KostCharge. Login, dashboard, WebSocket connect/disconnect, logout, and re-login all working correctly. No infinite loops, no excessive re-renders, no React warnings.
passed: Login with admin@kostcharge.com/admin123 succeeds, redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard loads stats (Rp 3.270.000, 3 tenants, 2 pending, 0 overdue) and recent invoices
WebSocket connects on login (/ws and socket.io/)
Socket.io WebSocket closes on logout (cleanup verified)
Re-login after logout succeeds and returns to /dashboard
No infinite loops: 0 API calls in 4s idle window post-login
No React warnings / no exhaustive-deps warnings in console
No JS page errors during the full flow

failed.issue: Native /ws WebSocket did not emit a close event during logout (only socket.io closed). May be minor timing/browser behavior; server may still hold the connection briefly.
failed.evidence: WS events after logout: only 'WS CLOSED: .../socket.io/...' logged; no close for /ws

action_items: Optional: verify SocketContext also explicitly closes the raw /ws WebSocket (not just socket.io) on user logout, though app-level behavior appears correct.
